# defaultWebsiteDataStore

**Instance Property**

The default data store for website data and cookie access in extension contexts.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var defaultWebsiteDataStore: WKWebsiteDataStore! { get set }
```

## Discussion

This property sets the primary data store for managing website data, including cookies, which extensions can access, subject to the granted permissions within the extension contexts. Defaults to [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WKWebsiteDataStore/default()].
title: defaultWebsiteDataStore
